intent: Integration-first Recraft generation manifest for the minimum playable Bango-Patoot QA demo vertical slice.

platform_targets.windows: Nearest-neighbor preview and QA build using the same sliced logical asset set as the 3DS build.

integration_truth: Recraft outputs are image masters, not native meshes, rigs, UVs, or authored animation clips.

This manifest therefore guarantees source-asset compliance for slicing, billboard rendering, impostor use, rig-reference tracing, and later mesh blockout reference, not literal automatic 3D mesh generation.
An asset is only considered 100 percent integration-accurate after it passes post-generation validation in the runtime pipeline.
shared_prompt_appendix: Orthographic or pseudo-orthographic technical game-asset presentation. Transparent background only. Center the subject inside the assigned cell. Keep a fixed grounded baseline across all frames. Preserve full silhouette with clean 2 percent safety margin on all sides. No perspective distortion, no lens effects, no depth of field, no motion blur, no bloom, no film grain, no painterly smudging. Use simple readable lighting with one clear key and soft fill. Keep material regions separable for later slicing, rig tracing, and mesh blockout. Make the asset readable after nearest-neighbor downsampling to the declared runtime target.
shared_negative_prompt_appendix: perspective camera, dramatic foreshortening, cinematic framing, background scene, environment backdrop, text, watermark, logo, crop, cutoff limbs, blur, motion blur, bloom, depth of field, grain, painterly smear, soft alpha fringe, muddy silhouette, inconsistent scale, inconsistent baseline, merged frames

integration_contract.baseline: Stable grounded baseline for every turnaround and every frame sequence.
integration_contract.alpha: Fully transparent background with no matte fringe.
integration_contract.scale: Subject should occupy roughly 70 to 82 percent of usable cell height unless intentionally oversized.
integration_contract.silhouette: No crop. Full form must remain legible at runtime export size.
integration_contract.materials: Fur, wax, brass, bone, cloth, leather, machine parts, and magical elements must remain separable at small scale.
integration_contract.rig_readiness: Major joints and layered costume masses must be readable for later skeletal tracing.
integration_contract.mesh_readiness: Turnarounds and modular kits must be suitable as blockout and UV-reference material for later modelling.
integration_contract.modularity: Environment kits must preserve seam-friendly edges and repeat-safe boundaries.
integration_contract.pivot_readiness: Every asset must allow a stable pivot assignment without guesswork.
integration_contract.collision_readiness: Silhouette must imply a coherent gameplay collision mass.

assets.name: bango_turnaround_master
assets.prompt: Transparent background four-angle turnaround sheet for Bango, horned underhive survivor, field harness, shrine-worn gear, readable silhouette, clean baseline, pseudo-3D shading for later nearest-neighbor reduction.
assets.negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, background scene, blur, missing limbs, off-center pose

translation_metadata.symbol_object_policy: meaningful contiguous image regions become self-contained symbol objects
translation_metadata.depth_inference_method: region stack, local shading, occlusion order, and cross-view consistency
